languages.text: "Взорвать-то взорвала... Только вот глаз мне куском черного камня выбило. Я его пыталась вытащить, но никак. Ни нож, ни спица его не берет. Потом привыкла уже как-то". {n}Дунавски рассказывает об этом буднично, но теперь вы понимаете, что шрамы на ее глазнице в основном нанесены ей же самой.{/n} "Теперь там все корнями заросло. То ли Погонщица постаралась, то ли сам Зарков хочет эти руины проклятые пожрать".

"I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."
languages.original_text: "Взорвать-то взорвала... Только вот глаз мне куском черного камня выбило. Я его пыталась вытащить, но никак. Ни нож, ни спица его не берет. Потом привыкла уже как-то". {n}Дунавски рассказывает об этом буднично, но теперь вы понимаете, что шрамы на ее глазнице в основном нанесены ей же самой.{/n} "Теперь там все корнями заросло. То ли Погонщица постаралась, то ли сам Зарков хочет эти руины проклятые пожрать".

traits.locale_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Knife nor needle would touch it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it flatly, matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked her will, or Zarkov himself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

languages.text: “我的确做到了……但作为回报，一枚黑石碎片夺走了我的眼睛。我试着把它挖出来，却做不到。刀也好，针也罢，都不行。久而久之，也就习惯了。”{n}杜纳芙斯卡说得轻描淡写，可你现在明白了，她眼窝周围的疤痕大多都是她自己弄的。{/n}“如今，根系已蔓过了整片遗迹。或许是那拒生花执行了自身的意志，也或许是扎尔科夫本身想要吞噬那片受诅咒的遗迹……”
languages.original_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

languages.text: "Onları havaya uçurdum, evet... Karşılığında kara taştan bir parça da gözümü aldı. Çıkarmaya çalıştım ama başaramadım. Ne bıçak ne de iğne iş gördü. Zamanla alıştım." {n}Dunawski, bundan sıradan bir şeymiş gibi bahsediyor ama artık göz çukurunun etrafındaki yara izlerinin çoğunun kendi kendine verildiğini anlıyorsun.{/n} "Şimdi kökler her şeyi kapladı. Çoban mı iradesini kullandı yoksa Zarkov'un kendisi mi o lanetli harabeleri yutmaya aç..."
languages.original_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

Zamanla alıştım." {n}Dunawski, bundan sıradan bir şeymiş gibi bahsediyor ama artık göz çukurunun etrafındaki yara izlerinin çoğunun kendi kendine verildiğini anlıyorsun.{/n} "Şimdi kökler her şeyi kapladı. Çoban mı iradesini kullandı yoksa Zarkov'un kendisi mi o lanetli harabeleri yutmaya aç..."

languages.text: « J'ai accompli mon objectif... mais un fragment de pierre noire a pris mon œil en contrepartie. Malgré tous mes efforts, je n'ai jamais réussi à le retirer. Ni les couteaux ni les aiguilles ne peuvent y parvenir. J'ai fini par m'y habituer avec le temps. » {n}Dunawski parle sur un ton détaché, mais vous comprenez maintenant que les cicatrices autour de son œil viennent pour la plupart de blessures qu'elle s'est infligées elle-même.{/n} « Maintenant, les racines ont envahi les lieux, que ce soit la volonté du Chasseur ou celle de la planète elle-même qui essaie d'engloutir ces ruines maudites... »
languages.original_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

Ni les couteaux ni les aiguilles ne peuvent y parvenir. J'ai fini par m'y habituer avec le temps. » {n}Dunawski parle sur un ton détaché, mais vous comprenez maintenant que les cicatrices autour de son œil viennent pour la plupart de blessures qu'elle s'est infligées elle-même.{/n} « Maintenant, les racines ont envahi les lieux, que ce soit la volonté du Chasseur ou celle de la planète elle-même qui essaie d'engloutir ces ruines maudites... »

languages.text: «Vaya si las volé... pero una esquirla de roca negra me quitó el ojo a cambio. Intenté sacarla, pero no pude. Ni el cuchillo ni la aguja bastaban. Con el tiempo, me fui acostumbrando». {n}Dunawski habla con total naturalidad, pero ahora entiendes que las cicatrices que rodean su cuenca ocular son, en su mayoría, autoinfligidas.{/n} «Ahora, las raíces han cubierto toda la maldita estructura. A saber si es la voluntad del Pastor o si el propio Zarkov ansía devorar esas ruinas...».
languages.original_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

Con el tiempo, me fui acostumbrando». {n}Dunawski habla con total naturalidad, pero ahora entiendes que las cicatrices que rodean su cuenca ocular son, en su mayoría, autoinfligidas.{/n} «Ahora, las raíces han cubierto toda la maldita estructura. A saber si es la voluntad del Pastor o si el propio Zarkov ansía devorar esas ruinas...».

languages.text: "Und ich habe sie tatsächlich gesprengt ... Im Gegenzug hat sich ein Splitter aus schwarzem Stein mein Auge geholt. Ich wollte ihn entfernen, aber das ging nicht. Kein Messer und keine Nadel konnten ihm etwas anhaben. Irgendwann habe ich mich an ihn gewöhnt." {n}Dunawski spricht sehr nüchtern über den Vorfall, aber jetzt ist dir klar, dass sie sich die Narben um ihre Augenhöhle weitgehend selbst zugefügt hat.{/n} "Mittlerweile haben die Wurzeln das ganze Ding überwuchert. Ob es der Treiber so wollte oder Zarkov selbst diese verfluchten Ruinen verschlingen will ..."
languages.original_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."

Ob es der Treiber so wollte oder Zarkov selbst diese verfluchten Ruinen verschlingen will ..."

languages.text: 「私は彼らを破壊した。その代償に、黒い石の破片が私の目に突き刺さった。それを取り除こうとしたが、刃物も針も刺さらない。やがて、私はそれに慣れた。」{n}ダナウスキーは淡々と語るが、彼女の眼窩の傷は主に自傷によるものだとわかる。{/n}「今では根がその全体を覆っている。ドローバーがその意志を貫いたのか、それともザルコフが呪われた遺跡を貪り食おうとしているのか…」
languages.original_text: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."
